milestones.description: Start game — pick one starter (trade the other two from Gold/Silver)
milestones.notes: Need all three for the collection. Branch saves or use separate Gold/Silver carts.

milestones.description: Clear Slowpoke Well, Gym 2 — Bugsy (Hive Badge)

milestones.notes: Breeding unlocks at Route 34 Day Care

milestones.description: Day Care opens — catch Ditto here for breeding
milestones.notes: Shiny Ditto is prerequisite for 1/64 breeding odds

milestones.description: Burned Tower — legendary beasts flee (Raikou, Entei, Suicune)

milestones.notes: Shiny breeding parent: Atk 14, Def 10, Spd 10, Spc 10

milestones.description: Clear Team Rocket HQ, Gym 7 — Pryce (Glacier Badge)
Clear Radio Tower — defeat Team Rocket
Dragon's Den — pass Elder's test to receive badge
Elite Four + Champion Lance — complete Johto main game
milestones.notes: Unlocks Kanto, SS Aqua, and post-game content

milestones.description: Mt. Silver summit — battle Red (final challenge)
